member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.AgentMessage.FromAgentId
member.summary: Sender agent ID. Null when the message originates from the user / system.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.AgentMessage.ToAgentId
member.summary: Target agent ID. Null routes to the default orchestrator.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.AgentMessage.Payload
member.summary: Arbitrary data passed between agents (tool results, structured outputs).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.AgentResult.DelegatedMessages
member.summary: Messages this agent wants the orchestrator to dispatch to other agents.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ExecutionContext
member.summary: Default mutable implementation of IExecutionContext. Use this directly or subclass it.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IAgent.Capabilities
member.summary: Tool IDs this agent is permitted to use.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IAgentRegistry.GetByCapability(System.String)
member.summary: Returns agents whose Capabilities list contains the given tool ID.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IApiKeyProvider
member.summary: Resolves API keys from any credential store — env vars, files, vaults, config, etc. Implement this interface to plug in Azure Key Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault, or any other credential backend.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IApiKeyProvider.GetApiKeyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the secret value for the given logical key name, or null if not found.
member.param: The logical name identifying this secret (e.g. "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"). How this maps to a vault path or secret ID is up to the implementation.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IBotContext
member.summary: Identity and runtime metadata for a single BotWorker instance.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IBotContext.BotId
member.summary: Logical bot name — shared across all instances of the same bot type.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IBotContext.InstanceId
member.summary: Unique ID for this specific process instance.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext.Prompt
member.summary: AI prompt inputs: system/user prompts, RAG context, memory, conversation history.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ILlmClient
member.summary: Provider-agnostic LLM interface. Implement this in a separate provider project (e.g. Valaiorp.LlmProviders) using HttpClient + System.Text.Json — no SDK deps required.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ILlmClient.ClientId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this client / provider (e.g. "anthropic-claude-sonnet-4-6").

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ILlmClient.CompleteAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.PromptContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a prompt and returns the full completion.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue
member.summary:
Enterprise work queue abstraction. Implementations: InMemoryWorkQueue — single-process, dev/test JsonlWorkQueue — JSONL file, single local bot SqlWorkQueue — SQL table, single or multi-bot, multi-machine
All bots sharing the same IWorkQueue instance (or same SQL table) form a bot pool — they compete for items from the same queue automatically.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.StartRunAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a bot session start against a queue. Returns the RunId that must be passed to EndRunAsync.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.EndRunAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks a bot session as ended and records the timestamp.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.PopulateAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkItem},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk-adds work items to a queue. Items must have QueueId set. Existing items with the same Reference are skipped (idempotent).

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.EnqueueAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkItem,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a single work item to a queue.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.AssignQueueToBotAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pre-assigns all pending items in a queue to a specific bot. Items already assigned to another bot are not touched. Use when you want a dedicated bot per queue rather than free competition.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.GetNextItemAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches and locks the next available item. Filters: queueId (required), tag, reference, botId (assigned-to). Returns null when no matching item is available.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.MarkCompletedAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks a work item as successfully completed.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.MarkFailedAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks a work item as failed. If AttemptCount < maxAttempts the item is re-queued for retry. If AttemptCount >= maxAttempts it is moved to DeadLetter.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IWorkQueue.GetReportAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a full status and statistics report for a queue.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.LlmResponse.ToolCalls
member.summary: Populated when the LLM responded with a native tool/function call instead of text. Check this before using — if ToolCalls is non-empty, Content will typically be empty or a brief thought string.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ToolCall
member.summary: A single tool/function call requested by the LLM in its response. Populated by when the model uses native function-calling (Anthropic tool_use, OpenAI tool_calls).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ToolCall.CallId
member.summary: Provider-assigned call ID (e.g. Anthropic toolu_xxx, OpenAI call_xxx).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ToolCall.ToolName
member.summary: Tool/function name as declared in the system prompt or tool spec.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.ToolCall.Inputs
member.summary: Arguments the LLM wants to pass to the tool.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.PromptContext.SystemPrompt
member.summary: Static persona / role instructions sent as the system turn.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.PromptContext.UserPrompt
member.summary: The runtime task or question from the user / calling agent.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.PromptContext.RagContext
member.summary: Chunks retrieved from a knowledge provider (RAG).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.PromptContext.MemoryContext
member.summary: Retrieved entries from short/long-term memory.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.PromptContext.ConversationHistory
member.summary: Prior conversation turns for multi-turn sessions.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.PromptContext.Variables
member.summary: Named variables substituted into prompt templates (e.g. {AgentName}).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.QueueRun
member.summary: Tracks a single bot session against a queue (start → end).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.AiParticipation
member.summary: Controls how much the AI is allowed to act within an AI Workflow, AI Agent, or Agentic workflow. Has no effect on IRPA workflows (AI is never invoked).

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.AiParticipation.ObserveOnly
member.summary: AI reads context and produces insights/logs — no execution decisions made.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.AiParticipation.ObserveAndSuggest
member.summary: AI proposes next steps; a human or approval gate must confirm before execution.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.AiParticipation.ObserveAndReact
member.summary: AI observes and acts autonomously — executes its decisions without approval.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.PlannerType.Reactive
member.summary: Rule-based reactive planner — responds to context signals, no LLM.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.PlannerType.Deliberative
member.summary: Code-authored fixed plan — fully deterministic, no LLM. Used for IRPA.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.PlannerType.Hierarchical
member.summary: Hierarchical task decomposition — no LLM, driven by registered modules.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.PlannerType.LlmBased
member.summary: LLM generates and optionally revises the plan. Used for AI Workflow and AI Agent.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.PlannerType.AutonomyAware
member.summary: LLM with full autonomy — dynamic re-planning, tool selection, sub-agent spawning. Used for Agentic.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.PlannerType.Manual
member.summary: Externally supplied JSON plan — no planner runs at all. The Plan JSON is deserialized directly and executed as-is. Useful for developer testing, plan replay, and LLM-generated plans passed in from outside the runtime.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.WorkflowType.Irpa
member.summary: Pure automation, no AI. Tools/modules run a fixed, code-authored plan.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.WorkflowType.AiWorkflow
member.summary: AI produces the execution plan; steps run deterministically after planning.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.WorkflowType.AiAgent
member.summary: AI plans and re-plans between steps based on intermediate results.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Core.Enums.WorkflowType.Agentic
member.summary: Fully autonomous AI — dynamic tool selection, self-directed re-planning, sub-agent spawning.
